mapper.select: SELECT id, template_code, template_name, message_type, subject, content, enabled, description FROM message_templates WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, template_code, template_name, message_type, subject, content, enabled, description FROM message_templates WHERE template_code = #{templateCode}
SELECT id, template_code, template_name, message_type, subject, content, enabled, description FROM message_templates WHERE message_type = #{messageType} ORDER BY template_code
SELECT id, template_code, template_name, message_type, subject, content, enabled, description FROM message_templates WHERE enabled = #{enabled} ORDER BY template_code
SELECT id, template_code, template_name, message_type, subject, content, enabled, description FROM message_templates ORDER BY template_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_templates (id, template_code, template_name, message_type, subject, content, enabled, description) VALUES (#{id}, #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{messageType}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{enabled}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE message_templates SET template_code = #{templateCode}, template_name = #{templateName}, message_type = #{messageType}, subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM message_templates WHERE template_code = #{templateCode}
